Home / Services / Excavation & Grading

Excavation & Grading

Precise excavation and grading services for residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

P & J Contracting offers expert excavation and grading services tailored to Baltimore's unique landscape. Whether you're digging a foundation for a new rowhouse in Canton or preparing a site for a commercial building in the Inner Harbor, we have the equipment and experience to get the job done right. We understand the challenges posed by Baltimore's clay soil and ensure proper compaction and drainage to prevent future problems.

Our excavation services include digging foundations, basements, and trenches for utilities. We use advanced GPS technology to ensure precise grading and leveling, creating a stable and even surface for construction. We also handle site clearing, demolition, and removal of debris.

We prioritize safety and environmental responsibility in all our excavation and grading projects. We take steps to minimize dust and noise pollution and protect nearby trees and vegetation. We are fully insured and licensed to operate in Baltimore and surrounding counties.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Survey and Layout
  2. 02 Step 2: Excavation and Hauling
  3. 03 Step 3: Grading and Compaction
  4. 04 Step 4: Quality Control and Inspection

Benefits

  • Ensures a level and stable surface for construction
  • Prevents water damage and soil erosion
  • Reduces the risk of foundation problems
  • Complies with local building codes and regulations

Frequently Asked Questions

How deep can you excavate?

Our excavation capabilities vary depending on the project requirements and site conditions. We can excavate to depths suitable for basements, foundations, and utility trenches.

What types of grading services do you offer?

We offer a full range of grading services, including rough grading, fine grading, and finish grading, to ensure a smooth and even surface for construction.

How do you handle underground utilities during excavation?

We carefully locate and mark all underground utilities before beginning excavation to prevent damage and ensure safety. We work closely with utility companies to coordinate our work and avoid disruptions.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with excavation & grading? Contact us today.
